'''Republic Mobile Surgical Unit 12''' was a [[Republic Mobile Surgical Unit/Legends|Republic Mobile Surgical Unit]] stationed on the jungle [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Drongar/Legends|Drongar]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] in [[20 BBY/Legends|20 BBY]]. It serviced the personnel of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] at the [[Battle of Drongar]] alongside other surgical units under the command of [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[D'Arc Vaetes]]. It, with all the other Republic forces on the planet, left when the [[Bota/Legends|bota]] mutated and became useless.

[[Rachott]] was a member of its staff.<ref name="Battle Surgeons" />

==Appearances==
*''[[MedStar II: Jedi Healer]]'' {{Mo}}
